docket_entries.description: REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (REVISED - NEW SUBMISSION) (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF NAILS, ANGELA

REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPARTMENT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE) (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF NAILS, ANGELA

ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 ; THE COURT DENIES YOUR REQUEST BECAUSE IT IS INCOMPLETE. YOU HAVE 10 DAYS AFTER THE CLERK GIVES NOTICE OF THIS ORDER (SEE DATE OF SERVICE ON ORDER) TO: PAY YOUR FEES AND COSTS, OR FILE A NEW REVISED REQUEST THAT INCLUDED: FORM FW-001 #10. AS TO PLAINTIFF NAILS, ANGELA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SIGNED-SEE SIGNATURE) SERVED APR-25-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AIRBNB
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (SMALL CLAIMS) - FOR HEARING ON JUNE 8, 2017 @ 3:30 PM (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF NAILS, ANGELA
ORDER ON REQUEST TO APPEAR BY TELEPHONE. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-08-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-08-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF ANGELA NAILS IS PRESENT; APPEARING BY COURT CALL. DEFENDANT AIRBNB IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY GENE LEE, PARALEGAL. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED BY PLAINTIFF NAILS, ANGELA
